description: Public status for TerranPage. This site is hosted on GitHub Pages, independent of the product AWS stack, so it can stay reachable during an origin outage.

components.name: API and console
components.description: HTTPS API, web console, and ingest.

components.name: Email delivery
components.description: Outbound paging email and delivery receipts.

history_note: We do not publish fabricated uptime percentages or SLA badges. This page shows hand-posted incident updates plus automated alarm signals when the product control plane can report them.
